description: Restructure the facilities maintenance plan at /home/ga/Documents/maintenance_plan_draft.docx. Apply 'Heading 1' paragraph style to the section titles 'Introduction', 'Equipment Schedule', 'Maintenance Procedures', and 'Emergency Contacts'. Format the 'Equipment Schedule' section in landscape orientation while keeping the 'Introduction' and 'Maintenance Procedures' sections in portrait orientation. Include page numbers in the footer of every page. Save the reformatted document as /home/ga/Documents/maintenance_plan_formatted.docx.
